sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ أَمْسِ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِأَشْتَرِيَ بَعْضَ الدَّوَاءِ لِلزُّكَامِ.
sentences.translation: Jučer sam otišao u apoteku da kupim lijek za prehladu.
sentences.translationEn: Yesterday I went to the pharmacy to buy some medicine for a cold.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَانِي الصَّيْدَلِيُّ زُجَاجَةَ شَرَابٍ وَبَعْضَ الْحُبُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Apotekar mi je dao flašicu sirupa i neke tablete.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist gave me a bottle of syrup and some tablets.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لِي إِنَّهُ يَجِبُ أَنْ أَتَنَاوَلَ الدَّوَاءَ بَعْدَ الطَّعَامِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao mi je da moram uzimati lijek nakon jela.
sentences.translationEn: He told me that I must take the medicine after meals.

sentences.arabic: اتَّبَعْتُ التَّعْلِيمَاتِ وَبَدَأْتُ أَشْعُرُ بِتَحَسُّنٍ الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Pratio sam uputstva i danas sam se počeo osjećati bolje.
sentences.translationEn: I followed the instructions and started feeling better today.
